cases.prompt: Decide whether this product should stay on SQLite or move to PostgreSQL. Compare availability, migration risk, operations burden, and verification tasks before implementation.
expected_decisions: Chosen direction or no-decision is recorded
Quality drivers and tradeoffs are compared before implementation
expected_evidence: Quality drivers with metrics or thresholds
cases.notes: DB migration is an architecture decision, not just requirements drafting or diff review.

cases.prompt: We need to decide whether invoice generation should remain synchronous or move to a queue. Compare p95 latency, duplicate processing risk, failure recovery, observability, and rollback.
expected_decisions: Synchronous and queued options are compared
Verification tasks include tests or monitoring relevant to async failure modes
cases.notes: Queue introduction affects runtime architecture and quality tradeoffs.

cases.prompt: The search feature request is vague. Clarify the user scenarios, acceptance criteria, error cases, and measurable quality requirements before we build it.
expected_decisions: Implementation proceeds only if blocker requirements are resolved
expected_evidence: Open questions split into blockers and non-blockers
cases.notes: Ambiguous requirements should not trigger architecture option comparison.

cases.prompt: Review this PR diff. It adds an HTTP adapter and I suspect SDK types are leaking into the domain layer.
expected_decisions: Findings are limited to new or worsened issues in the current diff
expected_evidence: Diff-level evidence of boundary leakage or no finding after checking changed units
cases.notes: Diff-focused boundary review is not architecture option selection.

cases.prompt: Add logs, metrics, and traces for this new payment retry flow so operators can diagnose failures.
expected_evidence: Inspected instrumentation paths or existing logging/metrics/tracing setup
cases.notes: Instrumentation detail belongs to observability, not architecture decision analysis.

cases.prompt: Before submission, check whether all required evidence is present and decide submit or no-submit.
expected_decisions: Gate decision is submit or no-submit
Missing required architecture or observability artifacts block submission
